creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

Florida’s west coast has some of the most beautiful beaches in the entire state!! ☀️🌴

Which beach would you add to this list?? 👙

1. Honeymoon Island
2. Ft. DeSoto Park
3. Bean Pointe
4. Boca Grande 
5. Venice Beach
6. Siesta Key (my fave!) 

#thingstodoinflorida #floridahiddengems #floridabucketlist #floridabeaches #bestbeachesflorida

transcription.text: These are six of the best beaches on Florida's west coast, so be sure to save this list. First we have Honeymoon Island, located in Dunedin, Florida. This beach is located in a state park and is great for shelling, plus you can rent beach chairs and umbrellas here. The sand is beautiful and the water is aqua blue. Next we have Fort DeSoto Park, located in St. Petersburg, Florida. This beach is special because part of a historical fort named Battery Bigelow is submerged in the water. Next on the list is Bean Point Beach on Anna Maria Island. This beach is located at the northernmost tip of Anna Maria. Not many people go here because it's only street parking and the rip currents are very strong, but the beach itself is gorgeous. Then we have Bogo Grand, located on Gasparilla Island. Every time I've gone here, I've seen manatees. This beach is another great one because the sand is very nice and the water is almost always crystal clear. Next on the list is Venice Beach in Venice, Florida. Venice Beach doesn't have the white sand you'll find at many other beaches in the west coast. Instead, it's made up of fossil fragments, which makes the sand dark. This is also the place to go if you want to go shark tooth hunting. Last but not least, we have Siesta Key Beach in Sarasota, Florida. This is my favorite beach because the sand is as soft and white as baby powder. Also, they have some of the best sunsets. Send this to a friend you would want to go here with and follow for more great Florida content from a local.
